_comment: Logistic-regression-style weights for the Malojawind model. bias + one weight per engineered feature. Updated automatically by verify_and_learn.py and backtest.py as real outcomes come in. Edit by hand only if you want to force a reset - back up first. Reset 2026-07-16: feature schema changed (dropped cloud_score, added ensemble/persistence/interaction features, then samedan_morning_score, then pressure_nowcast_score) - must be retrained from scratch via backtest.py before deploying. Same day: verify_and_learn.py's ground truth switched from Samedan to kitesailing.ch's Silvaplana reading (Samedan kept as fallback + a nowcast feature); the 15-18h window narrowing was tried and reverted back to 12-18h (see backtest.py's docstring).
